name: HSK 2 Vocabulary (汉语水平考试)
description: Mandarin Chinese vocabulary for HSK 2. Source: drkameleon/complete-hsk-vocabulary (MIT), derived from CC-CEDICT (CC-BY-SA 4.0).

field_values.value: bar (loanword) (serving drinks, or providing Internet access etc); to puff (on a pipe etc); (onom.) bang; abbr. for 贴吧
assistance; aid; to help; to assist
Belgium; Belgian; abbr. for 比利时

to go out; to come out; to occur; to produce; to go beyond; to rise; to put forth; to happen; (used after a verb to indicate an outward direction or a positive result); classifier for dramas, plays, operas etc
to wear; to put on; to dress; to bore through; to pierce; to perforate; to penetrate; to pass through; to thread
next in sequence; second; the second (day, time etc); secondary; vice-; sub-; infra-; inferior quality; substandard; order; sequence; hypo- (chemistry); classifier for enumerated events: time
to reach; to arrive; to leave for; to go to; to (a place); until (a time); up to (a point); (verb complement indicating arriving at a place or reaching a point); considerate; thoughtful; thorough
to obtain; to get; to gain; to catch (a disease); proper; suitable; proud; contented; to allow; to permit; ready; finished

waiter; waitress; attendant; customer service personnel
to press charges; to file a complaint

to reply; to answer; reply; answer

item; component; classifier for events, things, clothes etc
to introduce (sb to sb); to give a presentation; to present (sb for a job etc); introduction
to go forward; to advance; to go in; to enter; to put in; to submit; to take in; to admit; (math.) base of a number system; classifier for sections in a building or residential compound

(after a suppositional clause) in that case; then; (after a clause of action) as soon as; immediately after; (same as 是) merely; nothing else but; simply; just; precisely; exactly; only; as little as; as much as; as many as; to approach; to move towards; to undertake; to engage in; (often followed by 着) taking advantage of; (of food) to go with; with regard to; concerning; (pattern: 就 ... 也 ...) even if ... still ...; (pattern: 不 ... 就 ...) if not ... then must be ...
to think that ...; to feel that ...; to feel (uncomfortable etc)

two; both; some; a few; tael, unit of weight equal to 50 grams (modern) or 1⁄16 of a catty 斤 (old)

busy; hurriedly; to hurry; to rush
you (courteous, as opposed to informal 你)
